name: Turkey Tail
title: Turkey Tail | The Hippie Scientist
description: Turkey Tail (Trametes versicolor) is a shelf mushroom yielding two extensively studied polysaccharopeptides: PSK (krestin) and PSP. These compounds stimulate NK cells, macrophages, and T-cell activity, and PSK is approved in Japan as an adjunct cancer immunotherapy. Human evidence for standalone immune support in healthy populations is limited but supportive.

name: Valerian

name: Yohimbe
title: Yohimbe | The Hippie Scientist
description: Yohimbe is represented here as a bark-derived monograph anchored to yohimbine, an alpha-2 adrenergic antagonist with sympathomimetic effects.
